description: Patch the settings for a specific sensor

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable ambient light sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Ambient light threshold detection hysteresis margin (Lux). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Ambient light interrupt threshold low level from 1 to 503192 (Lux).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Ambient light interrupt threshold high level from 1 to 503192 (Lux).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable relative humidity sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Humidity threshold detection hysteresis margin (%). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Humidity low level threshold from 1 to 99 (%).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Humidity high level threshold from 1 to 99 (%).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable temperature sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Temperature threshold detection hysteresis margin (C). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Temperature low level threshold from -39 to 124 (C).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Temperature high level threshold from -39 to 124 (C).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable motion sensor.

children.name: sensitivity
children.description: Motion sensitivity (0-100).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable smoke and carbon monoxide alarm sensor.

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the sensor

fields.name: mac
fields.description: The MAC address of the device

children.name: percentage
children.description: Battery charge level from 0 to 100 (%).

children.name: isLow
children.description: Low battery charge level flag.

children.name: light
children.description: Ambient light value (Lux).

children.name: status
children.description: What range does the measured metric fall into

children.name: humidity
children.description: Ambient light value (Lux).

children.name: status
children.description: What range does the measured metric fall into

children.name: temperature
children.description: Ambient light value (Lux).

children.name: status
children.description: What range does the measured metric fall into

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable ambient light sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Ambient light threshold detection hysteresis margin (Lux). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Ambient light interrupt threshold low level from 1 to 503192 (Lux).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Ambient light interrupt threshold high level from 1 to 503192 (Lux).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable relative humidity sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Humidity threshold detection hysteresis margin (%). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Humidity low level threshold from 1 to 99 (%).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Humidity high level threshold from 1 to 99 (%).

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable temperature sensor.

children.name: margin
children.description: Temperature threshold detection hysteresis margin (C). Read-only value decided by sensor implementation.

children.name: lowThreshold
children.description: Temperature low level threshold from -39 to 124 (C).

children.name: highThreshold
children.description: Temperature high level threshold from -39 to 124 (C).

fields.name: openStatusChangedAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the door/window/garage was last opened or closed, nullable.

fields.name: isMotionDetected
fields.description: Whether sensor is currently detecting the motion.

fields.name: motionDetectedAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the last motion was detected.

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable motion sensor.

children.name: sensitivity
children.description: Motion sensitivity (0-100).

fields.name: alarmTriggeredAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the smoke or carbon monoxide alarm was triggered, nullable.

fields.name: alarmSettings
fields.description: Smoke and carbon monoxide alarm sensor settings.

children.name: isEnabled
children.description: Enable smoke and carbon monoxide alarm sensor.

fields.name: leakDetectedAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the sensor detected a water leak, nullable.

fields.name: externalLeakDetectedAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the sensor detected an external water leak, nullable.

children.name: isInternalEnabled
children.description: Enable internal water leak detection.

children.name: isExternalEnabled
children.description: Enable external water leak detection.

fields.name: tamperingDetectedAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp when the sensor detected tampering, nullable.

local.ansible:
- name: Patch sensor settings
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/sensors/{id}"
    method: PATCH
    body:
      name: string
      lightSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      humiditySettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      temperatureSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      motionSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        sensitivity: 0
      alarmSettings:
        isEnabled: true
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.ansible:
- name: Patch sensor settings
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/sensors/{id}"
    method: PATCH
    body:
      name: string
      lightSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      humiditySettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      temperatureSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        margin: 0
      motionSettings:
        isEnabled: true
        sensitivity: 0
      alarmSettings:
        isEnabled: true
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
